message: infra: migrate Redis endpoint to new EU cluster
body:
Migrates auth-svc Redis connection from redis-prod-us.internal to redis-prod-eu.internal.
Part of EU region failover initiative (see AUTH-88).
Config change applied via Helm values update.
Note: redis-prod-eu.internal DNS not yet resolvable from prod k8s cluster.
pr_title: infra: Migrate Redis to EU cluster

message: hotfix: revert Redis endpoint to redis-prod-us.internal
body:
Reverts PR-3301. redis-prod-eu.internal DNS record not propagated to prod cluster.
auth-svc was unable to connect, causing auth failures for all users.
Full EU migration rescheduled — see AUTH-102 for new timeline.
pr_title: hotfix: Revert Redis endpoint to US cluster
